news.headline: NVIDIA's Earth-2 AI improves UAE weather forecasting with G42, providing high-res predictions for extreme conditions.
news.summary: The Earth-2 platform by NVIDIA, in partnership with G42, is boosting regional weather forecasting in the UAE with high-resolution predictions. This initiative aims to address extreme weather challenges in the area.

news.headline: Bitfarms will reveal Q4 and full year 2024 financials on March 27, 2025, with a subsequent conference call.
news.summary: Bitfarms Ltd. will be announcing its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 on March 27, 2025, which will be accompanied by a conference call led by the company's management team.

news.headline: Inconvo strengthens data analysis with LangGraph-driven Conversational AI, enabling easy access to data insights for non-tech users.
news.summary: Inconvo is transforming data analytics using LangGraph to facilitate natural language queries, allowing non-technical users to access data insights easily. This revolutionary approach is changing the way data analytics is accessed and understood. With LangGraph, users can ask questions in plain language, eliminating the need for complex queries or specialized knowledge. This innovation has led to a significant increase in data accessibility, with a reported 40% rise in users successfully obtaining insights from the platform compared to traditional methods. By simplifying the data analytics process, Inconvo is paving the way for more individuals to leverage data effectively for decision-making and strategic planning.

news.headline: New sequencing models in blockchain aim to redistribute MEV, improving market fairness and fostering innovation. #Blockchain #MEV
news.summary: Discover how the redesign of transaction sequencing in blockchain applications is impacting the redistribution of Maximum Extractable Value (MEV), improving market fairness, and promoting innovation within decentralized applications. This shift is crucial for ensuring a more equitable and competitive environment within the blockchain space. Click to read more about this transformative development.

news.headline: NVIDIA launches Blackwell Ultra, boosting AI reasoning with improved performance for training and scaling.
news.summary: NVIDIA has unveiled Blackwell Ultra, an innovative platform tailored for the AI reasoning age. This cutting-edge platform aims to optimize performance across various stages, including training, post-training, and test-time scaling. With Blackwell Ultra, users can experience significant improvements in processing power and efficiency, revolutionizing the AI landscape.

news.headline: NVIDIA vGPU 18.0 boosts AI on virtual platforms, now compatible with Microsoft Windows Server 2025 & Proxmox VE, offers new AI tools for devs.
news.summary: The latest vGPU release from NVIDIA, version 18.0, is aimed at boosting artificial intelligence capabilities within virtual environments. This update brings support for Microsoft Windows Server 2025 and Proxmox VE, expanding the range of platforms compatible with NVIDIA's vGPU technology. Additionally, the release introduces advanced AI toolkits tailored for developers. These enhancements signify a major step in improving AI functionality on virtual setups, catering to the evolving needs of users and programmers alike.

news.headline: Blockchain is used in fentanyl trafficking; Chainalysis helps combat this. Cryptocurrency plays a key role. #globalissue.
news.summary: According to Chainalysis, blockchain intelligence is becoming crucial in addressing the global issue of fentanyl trafficking, as cryptocurrency is being more commonly utilized in these illegal activities. This trend highlights the growing importance of utilizing technological tools to combat crimes, with significant numbers of illicit transactions involving cryptocurrencies being tracked and analyzed for investigative purposes.

news.headline: NVIDIA Research drives AI and graphics innovation, influencing products with 20 years of pioneering work. Learn more.
news.summary: For the past 20 years, NVIDIA Research has played a crucial role in leading the way in AI, graphics, and computing advancements. Their groundbreaking work has greatly impacted major product innovations in the tech industry. To learn more, delve deeper into their research.

news.headline: Tezos unveils Trailblazers Initiative to support innovators with various missions for ecosystem growth. #Tezos #Trailblazers
news.summary: Tezos has launched the Trailblazers program, which aims to engage individuals in developing the ecosystem by participating in missions that contribute to growth. This initiative invites builders, creators, and changemakers to join and make a difference. The program offers a platform for individuals to work on various impactful tasks within the Tezos ecosystem.

news.headline: Alvotech buys Xbrane R&D ops and biosimilar XB003 for $27 million, enhancing biosimilar portfolio.
news.summary: Alvotech (NASDAQ: ALVO) recently revealed the purchase of R&D operations and a biosimilar candidate, XB003, from Xbrane Biopharma AB for approximately SEK275 million (around $27 million). The deal involves a cash payment of SEK102.2 million at the deal's closure, in addition to taking on SEK172.8 million in debt and accounts payable. Creditors have agreed to accept Alvotech equity shares to settle SEK152.8 million of the debt. This acquisition will boost Alvotech’s development capabilities and signifies its entry into Sweden’s life sciences sector. The agreement also includes gaining Xbrane’s research facilities located at Campus Solna near the Karolinska Institute in Stockholm.

news.headline: Dow Jones up before Fed meeting, Tesla drops; Warren Buffett purchases stocks. Live coverage on Investors Business Daily.
news.summary: Today, the Dow Jones Index experienced a notable increase on the stock market in anticipation of the upcoming Federal Reserve meeting. Conversely, Tesla’s stock saw a significant decline. During this period, billionaire investor Warren Buffett seized the opportunity to acquire shares in the market. The market performance was detailed in a live coverage report titled "Stock Market Today: Dow Jones Jumps Ahead Of Fed But Tesla Dives; Warren Buffett Makes These Moves.”

news.headline: Conflux (CFX)Portal Wallet faces security worries; to be delisted from Chrome with users urged to move to Fluent wallet for safety.
news.summary: The Conflux (CFX)Portal wallet, a Chrome plugin, is being withdrawn from the market due to security concerns. Users are urged to transition to the Fluent wallet for better security and assistance. Please find more details on this transition.

news.headline: Dow Jones Futures drop due to tariff uncertainty, Nvidia GTC event, and looming Fed decisions.
news.summary: Stock futures for the Dow Jones dropped as a result of concerns raised by an advisor to President Donald Trump regarding uncertainty surrounding tariffs. Additionally, Nvidia experienced a decline in anticipation of the GTC event. The overall market sentiment was impacted as investors also awaited updates from the Federal Reserve. These developments were highlighted in the latest news update on the stock market.

news.headline: Protembis forms new Scientific Advisory Board with world-renowned experts to guide strategic plans.
news.summary: In Germany, Protembis, a cardiovascular medical device company, has formed a Scientific Advisory Board (SAB) to offer objective advice and aid in company strategies. The SAB, consisting of four members, will provide scientific and clinical guidance, advise on trends and opportunities, and offer expertise in these areas. This move aims to enhance the company's strategic planning and ensure informed decisions. The board's contributions will be valuable in shaping future endeavors and advancing scientific and clinical initiatives for Protembis.

news.headline: Bitfinex promotes improved security for crypto traders to safeguard assets from cyber threats and phishing attacks.
news.summary: Bitfinex underlines the significance of strong security protocols for cryptocurrency traders in safeguarding their assets against cyber threats and phishing attacks. It is crucial for traders to prioritize security measures to protect their investments when engaging in the volatile crypto market. It is recommended that users enable two-factor authentication, use unique and complex passwords, and remain vigilant against potential phishing attempts. By prioritizing security, traders can better protect their assets and minimize the risk of falling victim to cyber attacks. Stay informed and take necessary precautions to ensure the safety of your cryptocurrency holdings.

news.headline: QXO to acquire Beacon Roofing Supply for $11 billion at $124.35 per share in cash, with nearly 600 branches in U.S. and Canada.
news.summary: Shares of QXO, Inc. (NYSE:QXO) and Beacon Roofing Supply, Inc. (NASDAQ:BECN) are seeing an increase in premarket trading on Thursday. QXO announced a definitive merger agreement to purchase Beacon for $124.35 per share in cash. Beacon, a distributor of roofing and exterior products, operates nearly 600 branches in the U.S. and Canada. In January, QXO disclosed plans for an all-cash tender offer for Beacon with an approximate total value of $11 billion. Beacon's board unanimously recommends that shareholders participate in the offer, which commenced on January 27 and has now been extended until 5:00 p.m. today.

news.headline: Steve Davis, Elon Musk's right-hand man, heads DOGE. Musk sees him as key to efficiency, likening him to chemotherapy.
news.summary: Steve Davis, a trusted associate of Elon Musk, has been appointed as the head of the Department of Government Efficiency. Musk compared Davis to chemotherapy due to his significant impact on improving efficiency within the department. Davis is expected to oversee operations and streamline processes to save costs and enhance productivity.

news.headline: Dow Jones futures drop for a second day despite Powell's efforts; Tesla, Nvidia, Boeing all see gains.
news.summary: Federal Reserve Chairman Powell addressed investors, prompting a positive response from major companies such as Tesla, Nvidia, and Boeing. However, despite Powell's reassurances, the stock market did not follow suit. Dow Jones Futures experienced a decline for the second consecutive day following Powell's statements, leaving investors on the lookout for specific signals indicating future market trends.

news.headline: Trade wars will pressure crypto & traditional mkts till April; BTC fell 17% since Jan.20. Analyst predicts potential resolution by April 2. Fed interest rates to continue impacting markets. Tariffs bring uncertainty until July. Markets eye key reports for future rate cuts.
news.summary: Global trade war concerns have been pressuring both cryptocurrency and traditional markets, with Bitcoin's price falling over 17% since US President Trump announced import tariffs on Chinese goods in January. A research analyst predicts that market pressure will continue until at least April 2, when potential tariff resolutions could be reached. President Trump's reciprocal tariff rates are set to take effect on April 2, contributing to market uncertainty. Additionally, high Federal Reserve interest rates are further dampening investor risk appetite. The Fed is expected to keep rates steady in the next meeting, but inflation and recession-related concerns are seen as transitory. Positive economic data may boost investor confidence and drive upside for Bitcoin and digital assets. Key reports to watch include Consumer Confidence, Q4 GDP, jobless claims, and the PCE inflation release.

Forum in Beijing discusses finance and new energy development on March 20 as part of 2025 Global South Financiers Forum.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, Beijing hosted the Parallel Forum on Inclusive Finance and Approaches to New Energy Industrialization Development as part of the 2025 Global South Financiers Forum. The event, organized by the Brand Work Office of Xinhua News, brought together various stakeholders to discuss strategies for promoting financial inclusion and advancing new energy industrialization. Key topics included access to financial services for underserved populations and innovative approaches to developing sustainable energy sources. The forum aimed to address pressing issues in these areas and foster collaboration among participants.

news.headline: Investigation probes 20 law firms for D.E.I. practices, focusing on SEO program helping students secure Wall Street jobs.
news.summary: An investigation by the federal government focused on Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion practices at 20 law firms. The inquiry highlighted the scrutiny on SEO, a long-standing program designed to assist students in securing positions in finance, particularly on Wall Street.

Bitcoin projected to hit six figures by 2025, says CEO Nigel Green. Fed rate cuts could drive people to BTC. Trump support not crucial.
news.summary: Nigel Green, CEO of deVere Group, predicts that Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) will reach a valuation of six figures by 2025, despite no explicit support from U.S. President Donald Trump. In a recent update, Green discussed Bitcoin's potential to surpass gold if the Federal Reserve reduces interest rates this year. He attributed gold's current rise to macroeconomic uncertainties related to Trump's tariff policies. Green suggested that if the U.S. dollar weakens due to rate cuts, investors may shift towards Bitcoin. He emphasized the digital nature of today's world and expressed confidence that Trump would eventually support Bitcoin. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Crypto debanking may continue in the US until Jan 2026: Industry faces challenges amid positive legislation. Source: Various sources
news.summary: The cryptocurrency industry in the United States is facing continued debanking issues despite recent positive legislation. The collapse of crypto-friendly banks in early 2023 led to allegations of Operation Chokepoint 2.0, with critics claiming it was a government effort to pressure banks to cut ties with crypto firms. Despite pro-crypto decisions by President Donald Trump, such as using seized Bitcoin to establish a national reserve, the industry still struggles with banking challenges. Caitlin Long, founder of Custodia Bank, highlighted that two crypto-friendly banks are under examination by the Fed, facing intense scrutiny. The industry saw a crescendo of outrage over debanking, culminating in a lawsuit led by Coinbase in June 2024. In the EU, cryptocurrency debanking remains a significant operational issue, affecting both small and large firms. Despite efforts by regulatory agencies like the OCC to ease restrictions, the problem persists. At least 30 tech and crypto founders were reportedly "secretly debanked" during Operation Chokepoint 2.0, highlighting the ongoing challenges faced by the industry.

Is Spring Break in Houston a potential sign of recession? Instead of traditional economic metrics, people are monitoring pop culture trends like Will Smith’s new album and the new season of "Ted Lasso."
news.summary: Economists are monitoring key economic indicators such as the unemployment rate and Gross Domestic Product (G.D.P.). However, on social media platforms, individuals are using pop culture events such as the release of Will Smith's latest album and the premiere of a new season of "Ted Lasso" as potential signals of economic instability. This shift in focus reflects a broader trend of  analyzing non-traditional metrics to gauge the economic climate. The unemployment rate currently stands at X%, while the latest G.D.P. growth rate is Y%.

news.headline: Danny Moses warns of economic risks from Elon Musk's DOGE-induced federal job cuts, impacting over 24,000 employees.
news.summary: Renowned for predicting the 2008 financial crisis, Danny Moses has raised concerns about the economic impact of recent federal job cuts. The founder of Moses Ventures warned that the market has not fully grasped the consequences of job reductions carried out by the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE), a move backed by Elon Musk. Moses emphasized worries about the detrimental effects on the economy, highlighting, “We're hurting the revenue side of the equation.” Under President Donald Trump‘s administration, more than 24,000 federal employees have been let go, with additional cuts looming. For more details, please refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

Tether engages a Big Four firm for its inaugural financial audit. CEO to verify USDT reserve backed at 1:1 ratio. Tether made $13.7B in 2024.
news.summary: Tether, a stablecoin issuer, is in talks with a Big Four accounting firm to conduct a full audit of its assets reserve to verify that its USDT stablecoin is backed at a 1:1 ratio. The CEO, Paolo Ardoino, mentioned that the audit process should be easier under the pro-crypto stance of US President Donald Trump. Tether has reported $13.7 billion in profit in 2024, and its USDT stablecoin claims to be pegged to the US dollar at a 1:1 ratio. However, concerns have been raised in the industry over Tether's lack of transparency and third-party audits. Tether has faced criticisms in the past regarding the transparency of its reserves, and in 2021, was fined $41 million by the CFTC for misrepresenting its reserves. Tether's recent hiring of a chief financial officer and engagement with a Big Four accounting firm are seen as steps towards addressing these concerns. European regulations have also impacted Tether, leading to the delisting of USDT and nine other tokens from exchanges like Crypto.com.

news.headline: Tether aims for first full financial audit by Big Four firm, seeking 1:1 backing for USDT. Profit of $13.7B in 2024, CFO hired for audit prep.
news.summary: Tether, a stablecoin issuer, is in talks with a Big Four accounting firm for a 1:1 audit of its USDT stablecoin reserves. CEO Paolo Ardoino believes the audit will be facilitated by President Trump's support for cryptocurrencies. Tether, which recorded a profit of $13.7 billion in 2024, faces scrutiny due to its lack of third-party audits, prompting the hiring of a CFO and commitment to a full financial audit. Concerns over Tether's transparency have been raised, with industry figures like Justin Bons and regulatory bodies pointing out issues with Tether's reserves in the past. Recent European regulations have led to delisting of USDT on some exchanges. Tether is hopeful that increased scrutiny will provide clarity and improve trust in its stablecoin.
